schema.description: National half-hourly carbon intensity for the Great Britain electricity grid, published by National Grid ESO. Contains the forecast and actual carbon dioxide emission intensity in grams of CO2 per kilowatt-hour, along with a qualitative index band.

period_from.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the start of the half-hour settlement period (e.g. 2026-04-06T09:30Z).

period_to.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the end of the half-hour settlement period (e.g. 2026-04-06T10:00Z).

forecast.description: Forecast carbon intensity for this settlement period in grams of CO2 per kilowatt-hour (gCO2/kWh), computed ahead of real-time by National Grid ESO.

actual.description: Actual (metered) carbon intensity for this settlement period in grams of CO2 per kilowatt-hour (gCO2/kWh). May be null when the period has not yet completed.

index.description: Qualitative index band for the carbon intensity: one of 'very low', 'low', 'moderate', 'high', or 'very high'.

schema.name: Intensity

schema.description: National half-hourly electricity generation fuel mix for Great Britain, published by National Grid ESO. Each field represents the percentage contribution of a specific fuel type to total generation during the settlement period.

period_from.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the start of the half-hour settlement period.

period_to.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the end of the half-hour settlement period.

biomass_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from biomass (wood pellets, energy crops, and other organic matter) during this settlement period.

coal_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from coal-fired power stations during this settlement period.

gas_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from natural gas (CCGT and OCGT) during this settlement period.

hydro_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from hydroelectric power stations during this settlement period.

imports_pct.description: Percentage of electricity supplied via interconnector imports from continental Europe and Ireland during this settlement period.

nuclear_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from nuclear power stations during this settlement period.

oil_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from oil-fired power stations during this settlement period.

other_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from other or unclassified fuel sources during this settlement period.

solar_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from solar photovoltaic installations during this settlement period.

wind_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from onshore and offshore wind turbines during this settlement period.

schema.name: GenerationMix

schema.description: Half-hourly carbon intensity and generation mix for one of the 17 GB Distribution Network Operator (DNO) regions, published by National Grid ESO. Each record covers a specific DNO region identified by its numeric region ID.

region_id.description: Numeric identifier for the DNO region as assigned by the Carbon Intensity API (1â€“17).

dnoregion.description: Full name of the Distribution Network Operator region (e.g. 'Scottish Hydro Electric Power Distribution').

shortname.description: Short display name for the DNO region (e.g. 'North Scotland').

period_from.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the start of the half-hour settlement period.

period_to.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp marking the end of the half-hour settlement period.

forecast.description: Forecast carbon intensity for this region and settlement period in grams of CO2 per kilowatt-hour (gCO2/kWh).

index.description: Qualitative index band for the regional carbon intensity: one of 'very low', 'low', 'moderate', 'high', or 'very high'.

biomass_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from biomass in this region during this settlement period.

coal_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from coal in this region during this settlement period.

gas_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from natural gas in this region during this settlement period.

hydro_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from hydroelectric power in this region during this settlement period.

imports_pct.description: Percentage of electricity supplied via interconnector imports in this region during this settlement period.

nuclear_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from nuclear power in this region during this settlement period.

oil_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from oil in this region during this settlement period.

other_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from other or unclassified fuel sources in this region during this settlement period.

solar_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from solar photovoltaic installations in this region during this settlement period.

wind_pct.description: Percentage of electricity generated from wind turbines in this region during this settlement period.

schema.name: RegionalIntensity
